title: Digital Marketing Intern
description:
Company Overview / Employee Value Proposition
V-SHIELD Asia is a Singapore-based ergonomics solutions provider focused on two core products: the Japet.W+ motorised lumbar exoskeleton and the V-SHIELD Industrial Back Support Belt. We help organisations reduce strain, fatigue, and back-injury risk in physically demanding roles—by combining medical-grade innovation with practical, workplace-ready implementation.

We operate like a lean, high-accountability team: move fast, communicate clearly, and deliver work we’re proud to put our name on—because in safety and performance, details matter.

Salary: SGD 1,200/month |
Duration: 4 to 6 months
Work Mode: WFH, with 2 days/week face-to-face (online or otherwise decided) with Commercial Lead (quick alignment)
Hours: Flexible (8 hrs/day), except when tasks require fixed timing

Responsibilities

  • Plan, create, schedule, publish, and engage with content across LinkedIn, Instagram, and TikTok to enhance brand presence and audience interaction
  • Publish SEO-led blogs and optimize website content by integrating keywords, images, on-page elements, and calls-to-action to improve search rankings and user engagement
  • Coordinate with developers to ensure timely delivery of website updates and realign content to support campaigns, messaging, and SEO priorities
  • Support campaign execution and content production, including providing assistance during occasional shoots to ensure high-quality deliverables
  • Conduct competitor and market research to inform strategy and compile weekly performance reports on social media and website metrics to guide continuous improvement

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Minimum ITE/Diploma qualification
  • Proficient in Canva for graphic design and CapCut for basic video editing
  • Strong execution skills and effective writing abilities
  • Bonus: Knowledge of SEO and analytics tools, with the ability to clearly brief developers on technical requirements


Contact : 82648305 or Apply Here.
